name: Anfarm Hellas
message: ANFARM is a manufacturer of generic pharmaceutical formulations for human use. The company sells its products to 31 countries and acts as third party manufacturer to 45 clients.We are ready to upload more than 35 GB of essential corporate documents such as: contact numbers and e-mail addresses of governments(!) of a few countries like Portugal, Spain and a few others (if somebody is interested), detailed financial data (audits, payment details, reports), corporate NDA’s, employee personal information, clients data, etc.
